     The Numbers Business Report

The Hunt (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $5,812,500Details
International Box Office $6,588,479
Worldwide Box Office $12,400,979
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,090,784
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,621,135
Total $4,711,919
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Twelve strangers wake up in a clearing. They don’t know where they are, or how they got there. They don't know they’ve been chosen… for a very specific purpose… The Hunt. In the shadow of a dark internet conspiracy theory, a group of elites gathers for the very first time at a remote Manor House to hunt ordinary Americans for sport. But the elites’ master plan is about to be derailed because one of The Hunted, Crystal, knows The Hunters’ game better than they do. She turns the tables on the killers, picking them off, one by one, as she makes her way toward the mysterious woman at the center of it all.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,304,455 (91.3% of total gross)
Legs:1.10 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,200,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,028 opening theaters/3,028 max. theaters, 1.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $7,572,713

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 13th, 2020 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: March 12th, 2020 (Wide) (Bolivia)
March 13th, 2020 (Wide), released as La Casería (Mexico)
March 13th, 2020 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
March 13th, 2020 (Wide) (Sweden)
March 19th, 2020 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
Video Release: March 20th, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
July 6th, 2020 by Netflix UK
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2617 (Cert #52363), 2/19/2020)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Plot point: Humans as Prey, Hunting, Mistaken Identity, Political, Satire
Release detail: Delayed Release
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Twelve strangers wake up in a clearing. They don’t know where they are, or how they got there. They don't know they’ve been chosen… for a very specific purpose… The Hunt. In the shadow of a dark internet conspiracy theory, a group of elites gathers for the very first time at a remote Manor House to hunt ordinary Americans for sport. But the elites’ master plan is about to be derailed because one of The Hunted, Crystal, knows The Hunters’ game better than they do. She turns the tables on the killers, picking them off, one by one, as she makes her way toward the mysterious woman at the center of it all.
